Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio

Class FlixelAudioManager

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio.FlixelAudioManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable, FlixelDestroyable
public class FlixelAudioManager extends Object implements FlixelDestroyable, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Disposable
Central manager for all audio: FlixelSound instances, master volume, sound groups (SFX and Music), and focus-based pause/resume.

Access via Flixel.sound. Supports separate groups for sound effects and music, global master volume, and automatic pause when the game loses focus (and resume when it regains focus).

  • Constructor Summary

    FlixelAudioManager()
    Constructs a new FlixelAudioManager with an internal MiniAudio engine and sound groups.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelAudioManager

      public FlixelAudioManager()
      Constructs a new FlixelAudioManager with an internal MiniAudio engine and sound groups.

  • Method Details

    • resetSession

      public void resetSession()
      Stops session audio and rebuilds SFX and music groups on the existing MiniAudio engine.

      Use this during Flixel.resetGame() instead of destroy() so the native backend is not torn down and re-created in one frame (which can break PulseAudio and similar backends).

    • getEngine

      @NotNull public @NotNull games.rednblack.miniaudio.MiniAudio getEngine()
      Returns the underlying MiniAudio engine for advanced use and asset loading.

    • getSfxGroup

      @NotNull public @NotNull games.rednblack.miniaudio.MAGroup getSfxGroup()
      Group for sound effects. Use for playing sounds or custom sounds that should be categorized as SFX.

    • getMusicGroup

      @NotNull public @NotNull games.rednblack.miniaudio.MAGroup getMusicGroup()
      Group for music. Used by playMusic(java.lang.String).

    • getSoundsGroup

      @NotNull public @NotNull games.rednblack.miniaudio.MAGroup getSoundsGroup()
      Returns the default group used when no group is specified (SFX group). Provided for backward compatibility with code that expects a single "sounds" group.

    • getMusic

      @Nullable public @Nullable FlixelSound getMusic()

    • getMasterVolume

      public float getMasterVolume()
      Master volume in 0-1. Values > 1 are clamped to 1 when applied to the engine.

    • setMasterVolume

      public float setMasterVolume(float volume)
      Sets the global master volume applied to all sounds.
      Parameters:
      volume - New master volume (values > 1 are clamped to 1).
      Returns:
      The new master volume.

    • changeMasterVolume

      public float changeMasterVolume(float amount)
      Changes the global master volume applied to all sounds of this audio manager by the given amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount to change the master volume by.
      Returns:
      The new master volume.

    • play

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound play(@NotNull @NotNull String path)
      Plays a new sound effect (SFX group).
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the sound (internal or resolved via FlixelPathsUtil).
      Returns:
      The new FlixelSound instance.

    • play

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound play(@NotNull @NotNull String path, float volume)
      Plays a new sound effect.
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the sound.
      volume - Volume to play with.
      Returns:
      The new FlixelSound instance.

    • play

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound play(@NotNull @NotNull String path, float volume, boolean looping)
      Plays a new sound effect.
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the sound.
      volume - Volume to play with.
      looping - Whether to loop.

    • play

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound play(@NotNull @NotNull String path, float volume, boolean looping, @Nullable @Nullable games.rednblack.miniaudio.MAGroup group)
      See Also:
      • play(String, float, boolean, MAGroup, boolean)

    • play

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound play(@NotNull @NotNull String path, float volume, boolean looping, @Nullable @Nullable games.rednblack.miniaudio.MAGroup group, boolean external)
      Plays a new sound effect.
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the sound.
      volume - Volume to play with.
      looping - Whether to loop.
      group - Sound group, or null to use the default SFX group.
      external - If true, path is used as-is (for external files, e.g. mobile).
      Returns:
      The new FlixelSound instance.

    • playMusic

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound playMusic(@NotNull @NotNull String path)
      Sets and plays the current music (music group). Stops any previous music.
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the music file.
      Returns:
      The new music FlixelSound instance.

    • playMusic

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound playMusic(@NotNull @NotNull String path, float volume)
      See Also:
      • playMusic(String, float, boolean, boolean)

    • playMusic

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound playMusic(@NotNull @NotNull String path, float volume, boolean looping)
      See Also:
      • playMusic(String, float, boolean, boolean)

    • playMusic

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSound playMusic(@NotNull @NotNull String path, float volume, boolean looping, boolean external)
      Sets and plays the current music. Stops any previous music.
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the music file.
      volume - Volume.
      looping - Whether to loop.
      external - If true, path is used as-is (e.g. for mobile external storage).
      Returns:
      The new music FlixelSound instance.

    • pause

      public void pause()
      Pauses all currently playing sounds. Used when the game loses focus or is minimized. Only sounds that were playing are paused; they can be resumed with resume().

    • resume

      public void resume()
      Resumes all sounds that were paused by pause(). Called when the game regains focus.

    • destroy

      public void destroy()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelDestroyable
      Destroys the object and releases all resources.

      destroy in interface FlixelDestroyable
